nodes.name: Swarm — weekly prediction
nodes.notes: Calls POST /weekly-run: downloads 60d xlsx for 8 swarm hives, runs LSTM, returns JSON. Timeout 5 min.

nodes.name: Alzas — update feature CSV
nodes.notes: Calls POST /weekly-alza-update: downloads 30d xlsx for all 17 hives, rebuilds daily_features_final.csv. Takes ~7-10 min. Timeout 12 min.

parameters.subject: =⚠️ [Bee Monitor] ALERTA ENJAMBRAZON — {{ $json.alert_count }} colmena(s) en riesgo ALTO

_meta.note: Requires: uvicorn on :8000, playwright installed with chromium. Start API: cd api && uvicorn main:app --port 8000. Start n8n: $env:N8N_USER_FOLDER="$env:TEMP\n8n_data" && n8n start. Gmail credential: Settings > Credentials > Add > SMTP, host=smtp.gmail.com, port=465, user=miguelpitufet@gmail.com, pass=<app-password>.
